notes: One person in the party must show proof of MA residency.
raw: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person. One person must show proof of MA residency. Additional instructions: -Each museum has its own hours and admission charges. Please visit each museum’s website for further information and holiday closings. -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.

source_phrases.notes: One person must show proof of MA residency
